title: Pennsylvania DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes (Blocked — OA schedule / SEIU 668 appendix pending)
description: Narrative research notes for Pennsylvania DDS pay: administering agency (PA DLI Bureau of Disability Determination), examiner classes on the Standard Compensation (SC) scale (Disability Examiner Trainee SC-08 / I SC-09 / II SC-09–10) and supervisor (Medical-Vocational Supervisor SC-11–12), all pay grades AGENT-INFERRED/unverified, estimated ranges from job postings + BLS OEWS, SEIU Local 668 Master Agreement 2023-2027 context, a fetch-attempt log (OA PDFs login-walled, SEIU 668 no direct PDF), and next steps. Companion to PA/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Pennsylvania Office of Administration (OA) / SEIU Local 668; PA Dept of Labor & Industry (DLI) Bureau of Disability Determination
source.title: PA DDS salary research notes (OA Standard Pay Schedule login-walled; SC grades agent-inferred 2026-05-08)

notes: Browser-fetch pending (README marks PA with the ◌ agent-inferred glyph): pay grades SC-08/SC-09/SC-10/SC-11–12 are agent-INFERRED and explicitly flagged INCOMPLETE/unverified against the PA OA Standard Pay Schedule, and the ranges are job-posting + BLS estimates. PA OA pay-schedule PDFs require login and the SEIU 668 contract appendix had no direct download. SEIU Local 668 Master Agreement 2023-2027 → temporal_coverage. Manual fetch: oa.pa.gov PCOMP (login), seiu668.org, or PA SCMS.
